title: purple stuff
description: just turns your tools into some purple alien like stuff i dont know lol
body:
archived for now

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a52ee3b00fa015dcefaa3aa9359c228d3b129d8.png)

This Pack makes your tools look more... alien like i guess?

Including:

All Diamond Tools,

All Netherite Tools,

and the Totem of Undying.

Pack works on all versions, starting from 1.16.x

All assets are made by me.
Do NOT reupload assets in anyway without permission! even if unmodified.
